Other: Top of Page: Mercurial Barometer. Manufactured by Green of New York, is placed in Captain's Office near a gunport that is often open when at anchor. Top of Page: The Psychrometer is in a lattice work box which hangs against the bulkhead under the poop and is altogether, in a favorable position for giving accurate results.

People: 1010: At 10.10 called all hands witness punishment, and read proceedings of Summary Court Martial in the case of John Williams (Lds), accused of assulting a sentry while in the Execution of his duty. Found guilty and sentenced to Solitary confinement for thirty days in double irons and bread + water, with full rations evry fourth day! and to the placed under sentry's charge on deck! After which extra police duty for three months. Findings and sentence approved and sentence ordered to be carried into effect by the Executive Officer.

People: 0800: Sail maker J.C. Herburt was placed under suspension for being under the influence of liquor

0945: general court martial in the case of Private Wm Osterman US.M.C. Tried for sleeping on post while sentry over prisoner. Found guilty and sentenced to be placed in solitary confinement on bread and water on board US Flag Ship Shenandoah for the period of two months. Every fourth day to be placed in double irons and allowed to air on the spar deck under a sentry's charge from 8 am until sunset and on that day to be furnished with full rations, To lose all pay which may become due him during the period of his confinement, amounting to twenty six dollars, and to be deprived of liberty on shore for the period of one year. Sentence in the above case is approved by the Comdr in Chief. That part of sentence relating to loss of pay is hereby remitted as are also nine of the twelve months deprivation of liberty on shore.
